geo.unsupported: Geolocation isn't supported in this browser

install.title: Install Absolute Travel
install.body: Add the app to your home screen — it works even with no signal in the mountains and forests.

update.title: Update available
update.body: We've improved the app. Refresh to get the new version.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Get notified about new messages, friend requests and reminders to go explore.
notifications.blocked: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings. Allow them for this site.

error.server-disabled: Notifications are temporarily unavailable on the server.
